title: Give up (renounce) Canadian citizenship: After you apply - Canada.ca
content:
## Give up (renounce) Canadian citizenship: After you apply
- 1. About the process

## Processing your application
Processing times will vary based on:
- the type of application submitted
- if the application is complete
- how quickly we expect to process applications we’ve already received
- how easily we can verify your information
- how long you take to respond to any requests or concerns
Learn how processing times are calculated .
Once we receive your application to renounce your Canadian citizenship, we will review it and begin processing. If your application is approved, you will be sent a renunciation certificate or confirmation of renunciation.

## Some applications may take longer to process
- If documents or fees (if applicable) are missing, we will return your application to you.
- If your case is complex, we may contact you to ask for more information or documents. Such cases may take longer to process.
Check the status of your application online . If the normal processing times have passed and you cannot check the status of your application online, you can send us an enquiry by using this Web form .

## A citizenship officer may need to interview you
